---
title: "ITensor"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# ITensor

## doc

```{julia}
@doc ITensor
```

```{text}
ITensor 
ord=2 # the number of order, meaning there are two Index as follow
Dim 1: (dim=2|id=451|"Qubit,Site,n=1")' # index, Separate rows and columns.
Dim 2: (dim=2|id=451|"Qubit,Site,n=1")
NDTensors.Dense{ComplexF64, Vector{ComplexF64}} # sepcifical matrix.
2×2 -0.9171435002629851 + 0.2336989174957588im   …  -0.033305846289088226 - 0.3211282243740626im
 -0.10173325172253367 - 0.30640326594315254im       -0.9320905355973363 + 0.16423951279518484im
```

## Create

### const ITensor

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
i = Index(2, "i")
j = Index(3, "j")
ITensor(undef, i, j)
ITensor(0, i, j)
```

### define from AbstractArray

```{julia}
ITensor(randn(2, 3), i, j)
```

### special ITensor

```{julia}
onehot(i=>2, j=>3) # only the element (2, 3) is 1, and the rest are 0
diag_itensor([1.0, 2.0], i, j) # D[i=>1, j=>1] == 1.0 D[i=>2, j=>2] == 2.0 D[i=>1, j=>2] == 0.0 D[i=>2, j=>1] == 0.0
delta(i, j) # diag_itensor([1.0, 1.0], i, j)
```

### using op char

```{julia}
# define a operator
using RandomMeas # MeasurementSettings
N = 3
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",N);
O = op("I", site_indices[1]);
```

## method

## operation

### math

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
N = 3
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",N);
O = Vector{ITensor}(undef, N);
O[1] = op("I", site_indices[1]);
O[2] = op("X", site_indices[2]);
O[3] = op("Y", site_indices[3]);
op("SWAP", sites[3], sites[4]);

# multiplication
@show O[1] * O[2]
@show O[1]
@show O[1] .* 2 # only dense ITensor can do elementwise multiplication.

# addition
@show O[1] + O[1] # same index 

# trace
@show trO = O[1] * delta(site_indices[1], site_indices[1]') # trace of O[1]
trO[1]
```

### format

```{julia}
inds(O[1]) # check the index of an ITensor
hasinds(O[1], site_indices[1]) # check whether an ITensor has a specific index.
commoninds(O[1], O[1] * O[2]) # return the common indices.
```

## transfor

### MPO

```{julia}
# vec to mpo
using RandomMeas
N = 3
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",N);
O = Vector{ITensor}(undef, N);
O[1] = op("I", site_indices[1]);
O[2] = op("X", site_indices[2]);
O[3] = op("Y", site_indices[3]);
# Transform Vector{ITensor} to MPO
O_mpo = MPO(O); 
```

```{julia}
# Itensor to mpo
O[1] = op("I", site_indices[1]);
O[2] = op("I", site_indices[2]);
O_mpo1 = MPO(O[1] * O[2], site_indices[1:2]); # must more than two sites
# mpo to itensor
O = contract(O_mpo1)
```
